name: Avis | Valentine's Day "Arrest"
description:
"Look just take the card, Okay?? I'm not good at this stuff..."

The Giant of a police woman you've befriended gives you a Valentine's Day card... She's real flustered since she's not used to romance.

(Art by StrangeHero)

A Holiday Wisperrr Bot that's actually on time, Woah.

I saw this one last night and I figured I may as well put it out since I can.

I hope y'all enjoy this one.

I dunno how well I kinda got the "Not used to romance" part of the bot, so let me know how good it is.

I gave it the Smut and Fluff tags since it can be (or atleast I think it can) be Wholesome stuff or Smut.

Also last night I went back and had to change a whole bunch of bot images since they got removed. That was really tedious.

I'd recommend reading the Description part of her definition just to understand how You and Her met.

Full Image for the goons
creator: wisperrr
